value: ai-dev-best-practices-march-2026: (1) Correctness over speed — ALWAYS. Every file gets tests, every failure gets fixed. (2) Plan first — design + review before coding. (3) Swarm + review gates — parallel implement, 4 specialized review agents, fix, review again. (4) Secure by design — concurrent security review. (5) Senior dev advantage — amplify expertise. (6) Cognitive debt — maintain understanding via docs, tests, architecture. (7) Research before guessing. Full doc: aesir-blueprint/AI-ASSISTED-DEVELOPMENT-BEST-PRACTICES.md

growth-areas-for-ai-dev: (1) COGNITIVE DEBT — developers overestimate understanding by ~17%. Test yourself: explain what code does BEFORE reading it. (2) IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS MATTER IN COMPLIANCE — when the product makes security claims, the implementation IS the product. (3) CHECKPOINT DISCIPLINE — if AI approach fails twice, git stash and start fresh. Never chain three fixes. (4) FULL SUITE BEFORE COMMIT — run all tests, not just yours.

process-improvements-march-2026: (1) DESIGN DOC BEFORE IMPLEMENTATION — for features >2hrs, design doc + review agents first. (2) MULTI-ROUND REVIEW — 3 rounds x 4 agents (tests, arch, security, quality). (3) CI MUST TEST EVERYTHING — all packages, all languages, all linters. (4) AGENT TDD ENFORCEMENT — tests first, RED, implement, GREEN, full suite final.

SESSION CHECKPOINT (March 18, 2026 ~11am): Massive planning session. Research complete across entire Aesir ecosystem. 15+ research agents ran. Key deliverables produced: 1) Patent draft updated with 6 new claims, 10 ASCII figures, updated prior art. 2) VARA-PRODUCT-VISION.md with 12 user journeys, gap analysis flows, feature matrix. 3) vara-architecture-research-2026-03-18.md with full competitive landscape. 4) 4 gap analysis reports (Gemini damage, features vs target, architecture alignment, library integration). 5) Customer feedback mapped to all project boards. 6) Vulcan v3.x board reviewed (396 issues, 12-phase backend refactor). NEXT STEPS: Write ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECTURE.md in aesir-blueprint, then VARA-0.9-BUILD-PLAN.md, then cut beads epics. Also need: init beads on vulcan-enterprise, check mimir board, migrate vulcan boards.
